pitch.title: Recall Debt
pitch.core_theme: The intrinsic value of our past and the danger of commodifying human experience.
pitch.logline: In a future where memories are used as collateral for loans, a ruthless repossession agent discovers his latest target's extracted memories contain fragments of his own forgotten past, leading him on a deadly hunt for the truth.
pitch.synopsis: Act I: Kael is the top memory-repo agent in Neo-London, extracting cherished memories from debtors. When he repossesses a childhood memory from a seemingly random woman, he experiences a vivid flashback of himself in that exact memory. Act II: Kael goes rogue, refusing to turn in the memory drive. He tracks down the woman, who reveals a massive corporate conspiracy: the bank is illegally splicing and selling premium memories to the ultra-rich, wiping the original owners' minds. Kael realizes his entire life is a fabricated construct made of stolen collateral. Act III: Kael and the woman infiltrate the central memory vault to upload the stolen memories back to the populace. In a final confrontation with the bank's CEO, Kael sacrifices his own fabricated identity to destroy the servers, leaving him a blank slate but finally free to create his own true life.

stage2_outline.title: Recall Debt
stage2_outline.logline: In a future where memories are used as collateral for loans, a ruthless repossession agent discovers his latest target's extracted memories contain fragments of his own forgotten past, leading him on a deadly hunt for the truth.

beats.description: Kael performs his job as Neo-London's top memory repossession agent with cold efficiency, extracting cherished moments from desperate debtors to satisfy corporate ledgers.
Kael repossesses a childhood memory from a seemingly random woman, but the extraction process glitches, forcing him to experience a vivid flashback where he exists within her exact memory.
Haunted by the impossible flashback, Kael secretly analyzes the memory drive instead of turning it over to the corporate vault.
Corporate security detects his unauthorized access and moves to terminate him, therefore Kael goes rogue, stealing the drive and escaping into the neon-lit underground to find the woman.
Kael navigates the perilous black markets of Neo-London to track down the woman, discovering her name is Elara and she is part of an underground resistance.
Corporate hitmen corner Elara, but Kael intervenes to save her, forcing an uneasy alliance as they flee the sector together.
Elara reveals the horrifying truth that the bank illegally splices and sells premium memories to the ultra-rich while wiping the original owners completely.

Elara scans Kael's neural signature and proves that his entire life is a fabricated construct made of stolen collateral, shattering his reality and giving him a deeply personal reason to destroy the system.
Realizing the bank holds the original memories of thousands, including his own, Kael and Elara devise a highly dangerous plan to breach the central memory vault.
They attempt to steal biometric bypass codes from a mid-level executive, but it is a setup orchestrated by the bank's ruthless CEO, leading to a massive firefight.
During the escape, Elara is captured by corporate forces and subjected to a partial mind-wipe, leaving Kael alone and stripped of his only ally.
Refusing to let Elara become a hollow shell and accepting that his own past is a lie, Kael arms himself to the teeth and decides on a suicidal frontal assault on the central vault.
Kael infiltrates the heavily fortified central bank using his intimate knowledge of corporate security protocols and sheer brute force.
Fighting his way floor by floor, Kael rescues a disoriented Elara and breaches the core server room where the stolen memories are stored.

The CEO traps them in the server core and initiates a system lockdown, therefore Kael hardwires his own neural implant into the mainframe, sacrificing his fabricated identity to override the system and broadcast all stolen memories back to their original owners.
The servers detonate and the corporate empire crumbles. Kael awakens in the aftermath as a complete blank slate, but as Elara takes his hand, he smiles, finally free to create his own true life.
